pageContent:
# Core

The Core module owns the engine entry points, configuration resolution, and structural analysis workflow.

## Key Components

- `src/index.ts`
- `src/config/resolver.ts`
- `src/analysis/analyze.ts`

## Responsibilities

- Resolves runtime configuration before execution.
- Normalizes analysis output into engine-native types.
- Coordinates the top-level SDK surface.
title: Core
